label: FACIS SFTP — DLQ
info:
Dead-letter publisher for parse, publish, archive, sftp, filter, and
uncaught failures.

This is **NEW behaviour** vs the Python service. Python configured
INGEST_DLQ_TOPIC but never produced to it (parse failures were silently
logged; delivery failures were appended to a list and logged).

DLQ envelope shape:
  {
    error_type:       'parse'|'publish'|'archive'|'sftp'|'filter'|'uncaught',
    error_message:    string,
    error_timestamp:  ISO 8601,
    filename:         original filename | null,
    source_topic:     'sftp://host/path/file' | null,
    original_envelope: <Bronze envelope> | null
  }

Uses the same kafka-broker-config as the Kafka tab (re-declared by ID).

name: format DLQ envelope + metric
